summary: Canonical remains #90548. #75767 is related macOS lsof restart pain, not a true duplicate: it centers on SMB-mounted volume stat() stalls during gateway restart/force, while #90548 centers on repeated per-port lsof polling and launchservicesd/WindowServer availability risk. #90622 is useful context but is excluded as an existing-overlap ref and carries merge-risk labeling, so this worker should not create or merge an executable fix path from it. No close, merge, label, or fix PR action is safe in this pass.
